testcase.name: test_branding_settings_get

failure.message: AssertionError: Branding settings GET failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_category_standardization_v279.py:141: in test_branding_settings_get assert response.status_code == 200, f"Branding settings GET failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Branding settings GET failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
